gateOutcomes.rationale: Run provenance is eligible for current proof, with build identity and scenario validation recorded.
No-touch proof remained clean for this run.

recommendations.title: Overbright governance is producing perceptual washout risk
recommendations.suspectedCause: Authority, compositor, or lighting ceilings are not preserving contrast and saturation early enough.

recommendations.title: Ring authority is lingering too long or over-drawing the chamber read
recommendations.suspectedCause: Ring persistence and field density are staying too dominant after the cue should move on.

recommendations.title: Playable motif scenes are not reading as stable authored scenes
recommendations.suspectedCause: Scene routing, palette base, or signature moment posture is drifting away from the locked motif instead of holding an authored scene long enough to read.
targetMetrics: dominantParticleFieldJob != none when particles are active
